common.error_desc: Could not load data. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Check the latest news and updates.
notifications.demo_message: A pool just opened a spot so you can try the full experience.

pwa.title: Install the app
pwa.description: Keep ArenaCUP on your home screen for a smoother mobile experience.

onboarding.title: Welcome to ArenaCUP
onboarding.description: Choose your favorite team for the 2026 World Cup.
onboarding.notifications_description: Turn on notifications to get match alerts, results and real-time updates from your pool.
onboarding.notifications_denied: No problem. You can enable them later in your device settings.

rules_page.title: Rules
rules_page.subtitle: Arena Cup 2026 • Official handbook
rules_page.hero_desc: Welcome to ArenaCup! Understand how our scoring system, deadlines and tiebreak criteria work so you can climb the global ranking.
rules_page.footer_desc: Questions about the system? Reach out to official support through the app.

exact.title: Exact Score
exact.example: You predicted 2-1 and the match ended 2-1.

winner_goal_diff.title: Winner + Goal Difference
winner_goal_diff.example: You predicted 3-1 (goal diff 2) and it ended 2-0 (goal diff 2).

winner_and_goals.title: Winner + Goals for one team
winner_and_goals.example: You predicted 2-1 and it ended 2-0 (winner A + 2 goals A).

winner_only.title: Only Winner/Draw
winner_only.example: You predicted 1-0 and the match ended 3-1.

single_score.title: Only one score right
single_score.example: You predicted 1-1 and the match ended 0-1.

operation.deadlines_desc: Predictions can be made or changed until 30 minutes before each match starts in local time.
operation.live_update_desc: The official ranking and participant points are processed automatically at the final whistle of each match.
operation.responsibility_desc: In private groups with prizes, responsibility belongs exclusively to the organizer. ArenaCup is only the automation platform.

cookie.banner_text: We only use essential cookies for authentication.
cookie.learn_more: Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
